name: Access 2T
description: RPA to identify priority failures and notify teams via email, MS Teams and Shesha escalation.
strategic_outcome: Faster notification and escalation of priority failures to improve operational responsiveness.
kpi: Improve MTTL, MTTD and contribution to MTTR reduction

name: Resolve Link Test
description: Automation to test a transmission link when requested by a vendor via the ticketing system.
strategic_outcome: Reduce vendor request handling time and improve response consistency.
kpi: Improve vendor request response time and contribution to MTTR reduction

name: Resolve Link Troubleshooter
description: Automation to test transmission links during troubleshooting without logging into multiple EMS platforms.
strategic_outcome: Reduce multi-tool troubleshooting effort and speed up transmission link diagnostics.

name: AIOps Core FQDN Fault Runbook
description: Uses CGR and naming correlation to support faster fault handling.
strategic_outcome: Improve correlation-driven fault handling in core environments.

name: Zero Touch: ASOC Ask Katlego
description: Chatbot for incident management, report management, documents and guide queries.
strategic_outcome: Provide fast conversational access to incident knowledge, reporting guidance and operational documentation.
baseline_kpi: Manual search across reports and documentation
target_kpi: Operational incident assistant adopted by FM teams

name: Zero Touch: ASOC FM Root Cause Analysis
description: Analyses log files, documents and anomalies to produce RCA reports with possible solutions.
strategic_outcome: Accelerate root-cause analysis and reduce dependency on manual log investigation.
target_kpi: Operational RCA support for major troubleshooting scenarios

name: Zero Touch: ASOC AIOps SOC Assistant
description: Provides alarm details, possible root cause and fixes, and populates the incident/task.
strategic_outcome: Improve alarm interpretation and reduce manual incident enrichment effort.
kpi: Improve MTTL and MTTD as contribution to MTTR reduction

name: Zero Touch: ASOC AIOps Incident Summarisation
description: Agentic AI integration to AIOps grouping to perform root cause analysis and one incident summary.
strategic_outcome: Reduce incident noise and provide one high-quality incident summary from correlated AIOps groupings.
target_kpi: Automated summary for grouped AIOps incidents

name: CoreXplore
description: CSI IMS domain agent for CS and PS KPI reports, anomaly detection, historical comparisons and first-level interpretation.
strategic_outcome: Reduce repetitive KPI query handling and speed up performance insight generation.
kpi: Reduction in daily queries; approximately 300 minutes per day avoided
baseline_kpi: 15 minutes per query; repetitive report handling
target_kpi: Sustained PM query automation and first-level interpretation

name: PM: Ask ASOC
description: GenAI agent to answer ad hoc ASOC service performance management queries.
strategic_outcome: Enable conversational access to ASOC service performance insight.
kpi: Reduction in daily queries; avoidance of 15 queries per day
target_kpi: Operational PM assistant for daily queries

name: New IP Service Creation
description: Chatbot-led new IP service creation from minimal user input with progress and issue communication.
strategic_outcome: Accelerate IP service creation and reduce manual configuration effort.

name: Configuration Verification Assistant
description: Assistant for operations and RAN teams to verify and localise issues for queried sites.
strategic_outcome: Improve configuration issue localisation and reduce time spent verifying network state.
target_kpi: Operational verification assistant for CM queries

name: Auto Config Engine
description: Allows users to query raw configuration data, generate configuration scripts and execute them safely.
strategic_outcome: Move from manual configuration generation to intent-led configuration execution with governance and control.

name: Huawei RAN Batch Automation with AI (RITA)
description: Bulk command execution, result collection, reporting and AI-guided interaction for Huawei RAN operations.
strategic_outcome: Transform bulk network operations from manual slow execution into fast AI-guided automation at scale.
kpi: Manual execution time reduced from hours to minutes
target_kpi: Production-ready batch automation with AI-guided reporting

name: Fault Localisation Automation (IP/MPLS)
description: Automated fault investigation workflows, diagnostics, structured results and recommendations.
strategic_outcome: Standardise fault localisation and reduce outage investigation duration across IP/MPLS.
kpi: Faster fault isolation and reduced outage duration

name: AI-Driven Alarm Intelligence & Self-Healing (RAN)
description: Automated alarm ingestion, AI RCA, automated MML remediation, closed-loop validation and reporting.
strategic_outcome: Enable closed-loop self-healing RAN operations by detecting, diagnosing, fixing and validating faults automatically.
target_kpi: Closed-loop RAN self-healing for selected alarm classes

name: OSS: Agentic API Automation
description: Extends APIs through MCP and agentic interfaces to securely execute commands across Network, IT and Fintech.
strategic_outcome: Create a reusable agentic API execution layer for cross-domain automation.
kpi: Reduction in provisioning and manual operational effort
baseline_kpi: Manual API execution and cross-system coordination

name: OSS: Unified Incident Intelligence
description: GenAI interface to query Network, IT and Fintech faults and service health from a single conversational view.
strategic_outcome: Federate incident intelligence across Network, IT and Fintech into one conversational operational view.
kpi: Reduced manual effort across multiple tools and improved response times

name: OSS: Automated Jira Ticket Governance
description: Augments accountability, sizing, check-ins and stakeholder updates for ASOC/OSS coordination.
strategic_outcome: Improve delivery governance visibility and reduce manual follow-up effort.
kpi: Improved visibility and reduction in manual follow-ups
baseline_kpi: Manual Jira follow-ups and stakeholder updates
